'''Pyollian cake''' was a extremely sweet, gooey dessert from the [[Pyolli system/Legends|Pyolli system]]. It was made from [[sweet cake mix]], [[oat]]s, [[carbosyrup]], and [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]].
